svg.title: GovAdmin TailAdmin system flow diagram
svg.desc: A monochrome architecture and process diagram showing how the static pages, build pipeline, runtime modules, Firebase data, dashboard widgets, civic workflows, reports, calendar, map, and image resize modules work together.
svg.text: Static Webpack dashboard template with Firebase Auth, Firestore data, client-side civic workflows, charts, reports, calendar, map, and resize widgets
Generates one HTML file per src page
Injects bundled JS at body end
HOW THE SYSTEM WORKS IN ONE PASS
Webpack expands static HTML pages and partials, injects one bundled JavaScript entry, extracts CSS, and serves or builds the dashboard assets.
At runtime the browser starts Firebase, guards routes with Auth, hydrates user profile UI from Firestore, then initializes Alpine state and visual modules.
User workflows write and read Firestore subcollections, while report and export workflows transform those records into downloadable PDF or CSV files.
